description: Add a fresh twist to your accessories this summer by wearing a classic adidas timepiece with updated design details. Sporty at heart but stylish on your wrist, this watch makes for a great buy! Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 Years Black plastic case with a fixed bezel Black grooved, rubber strap with a tang clasp Digital time display Alarm, stop clock, light display features Lap memory that allows the watch to record your laps Steel case back 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 100 meters, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling and swimming
